description: Reconstruct the sky conditions for Ansel Adams' 'Moonrise, Hernandez, New Mexico' photograph in Stellarium. Configure the location to Hernandez, New Mexico (36.0697° N, 106.1197° W, 1734m) and the time to November 1, 1941, at 23:49 UTC. Ensure the Azimuthal Grid, Meridian Line, Atmosphere, and Landscape/Ground are enabled for forensic measurement. Center the view on the Moon, capture a screenshot, and persist these settings in the application configuration. Write a report to ~/Desktop/moonrise_exhibit_notes.txt documenting the historical date and UTC time, the geographic location, and confirmation that the Moon was above the horizon.
